LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleInert.description: An ancient shuttle, scarred and worn out by endless centuries spent trawling between stars. Its reactor has been rendered useless, making it only good for scrap.
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleInert.label: inert shuttle
LanguageData.Spaceports_SurpriseShuttle.description: A mysterious shuttlecraft. Its transponder has been disabled, and all attempts at remote communication have failed. Approach with caution.
LanguageData.Spaceports_SurpriseShuttle.label: mysterious shuttle
